name: Blueberry Breakfast Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Add the eggs and vanilla; beat well.
3. Stir in the flour and baking powder until fully combined.
4. Spread half of the mixture into an ungreased 15" x 10-inch pan.
5. Carefully place the blueberry pie filling over the batter.
6. Cover with the remaining dough, dropping teaspoonfuls on top.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until golden brown. Do not underbake.
8. In a small bowl, mix powdered sugar, melted margarine, and lemon juice.
9. Drizzle the mixture over warm bars before serving.
